column2: Son, Holland, September 20th, 1944. Elements of the 327th Glider Infantry and British tanks reinforce the Bailey bridge against a renewed German attack from the Southeast.
The German player wins by having the only units in hex 5G5 and 5G7 at the end of any game turn.
Boards 4 and 5. At least 3 Squads and 1 WT must be set up on Board 4 in a hex numbered 1. At least 4 Squads, WTs, or Guns must be set up North of the canal.
The American player may exchange any 2 units for Decoys to have the scenario end after Turn 9.
Set up on any hex on board 2.
